_cite.reason: URL-normalization 1c: strip trailing markdown-emphasis `*`/backtick glued to citation URLs in intelligence_item_sections.content_md (customer-checkable link + validate_item_provenance criterion-2 exact-compare). Operator ruling 2026-07-04. Same transform as the write-site fix.

prior.content_md:
| Date | Instrument | Milestone | What the Workspace Must Have Done |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 July 2013 | EUR-Lex / OJ | Electronic OJ becomes authentic legal record | Use EUR-Lex as primary source for all EU law; secondary sources are not authoritative |
| 1 January 2024 | EU ETS Maritime | 40% EUA surrender obligation begins for vessel operators | Monitor ocean carrier ETS surcharges; validate against EEA EUA price data |
| 1 January 2025 | ReFuelEU Aviation | 2% SAF blending mandate in force at EU airports | Anticipate airline fuel surcharge increases on EU air routes; request carrier transparency on SAF cost methodology |
| 1 January 2025 | FuelEU Maritime | GHG intensity reduction obligation begins for vessels ≥5,000 GT at EU ports | Monitor ocean carrier compliance surcharges on EU port-call routes |
| 12 February 2025 | PPWR (EU) 2025/40 | Regulation enters into force | Begin legal review of whether workspace packaging transactions constitute "placing packaging on the EU market"; monitor EUR-Lex for delegated acts |
| 1 January 2026 | EU ETS Maritime | 100% EUA surrender obligation — maximum cost exposure year | Model ocean freight surcharge impact for clients on EU trade lanes |
| 1 January 2026 | CBAM (EU) 2023/956 | Definitive phase begins; certificate purchase and surrender required | Confirm CBAM declarant workflows for any covered goods the workspace handles as customs representative |
| TBC — pending OJ publication | EU Transport Emissions Accounting | Final adoption and OJ publication; implementation period begins | Build or procure per-shipment GHG calculation capability across air, road, and ocean modes |
| 2030 | ReFuelEU Aviation | SAF blending rises to 6%; synthetic fuel sub-mandate begins | Anticipate continued upward pressure on air freight fuel costs |
| 2030 | FuelEU Maritime | Onshore power supply obligations begin for applicable vessels at EU ports | Monitor vessel operator compliance and surcharge structures |

*Sources: EEA EU ETS Data Viewer, https://www.eea.europa.eu/en/analysis/maps-and-charts/emissions-trading-viewer-1-dashboards. Regulation (EU) 2023/2405, https://eur-lex.europa.eu/eli/reg/2023/2405/oj/eng. Regulation (EU) 2023/1805, https://eur-lex.europa.eu/eli/reg/2023/1805/oj/eng. Regulation (EU) 2025/40, https://eur-lex.europa.eu/eli/reg/2025/40/oj/eng. Regulation (EU) 2023/956, https://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/EN/TXT/?uri=CELEX:32023R0956. COM(2023) 441, https://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/EN/TXT/?uri=comnat:COM_2023_0441_FIN. Council of the EU, Fit for 55, https://www.consilium.europa.eu/en/policies/fit-for-55/.*

---
